episodes.title: Scientology founder is the anti-Christ #scientology #christianity #anticristo #fsciento #sptv
episodes.description:
L. Ron Hubbard, the founder of Scientology describes the anti-Christ as being the force of enlightenment and sees himself in that. He thought that he was the anti-Christ.

-No doubt you are familiar with the Revelations section of the Bible where various events are predicted. Also mentioned is a brief period of time in which an arch-enemy of Christ, referred to as the anti-Christ represents the forces of Lucifer (literally, the “light bearer” or “light bringer”), Lucifer being a mythical representation of the forces of enlightenment, the Galactic Confederacy. My mission could be said to fulfil the Biblical promise represented by this brief anti-Christ period.-
Student Briefing, OT VIII Series 1 HCO Bulletin 5.05.1980

Student Briefing, OT VIII Series 1 HCO Bulletin 5.05.1980

episodes.title: In Scientology not all have rights #scientology #fsciento #humanrights #civilrights #sptv
episodes.description:
Ever wondered why Scientology is seen by many as a dehumanizing organization?
L. Ron Hubbard wrote a tone scale of human emotions, that goes from +40.00 down to 0.00 (body death) and further down to -40.00. The higher you are on this scale, the better you are off and the more beneficial you are to others.
However, if you have emotions that are deemed by Scientology to be bad, then you should have your rights stripped from you.

-In any event, any person from 2.0 down on the Tone Scale should not have, in any thinking society, any civil rights of any kind, because by abusing those rights he brings into being arduous and strenuous laws which are oppressive to those who need no such restraint.-
SCIENCE OF SURVIVAL

episodes.title: Scientology protesting cards
episodes.description:
In this video I talk about an aid that I have made for myself for when  am out protesting Scientology. I hope you find it helpful and informative. Here is the  text which is on the cards:

ON CHILDREN
The 7yr old girl who shudders because a man kisses her is not computing; she is reacting to an engram since at 7 she should see nothing wrong with a kiss, not even a passionate one.
DIANETICS The Modern Science of Mental Health

Children are beings and are to be treated as such. They work in the division of the Org and come under the Sea Org Staff Member. They are to be given posts, stand watches and are provided uniforms.
FLAG ORDER 485 7.03.1968

Every Sea Org Member must be included on the W.Q.S.B. and Org Board regardless. Age 6 and above.
FLAG ORDER 780 29.05.1968

WQSB – Watch Quarter Station Bill. This is a large chart that is located in Sea Orgs that lists out where each person lives, what their cleaning station is, weather they are on port or starboard watch, and any number of other details about the person.

ON LEAVING SCIENTOLOGY
In Scientology we have the phenomenon of preclears in session or students on courses deciding to leave and never coming back. And that gives us more trouble than most other things all combined…

People leave because of their own overts and withholds. That is the factual fact and the hardbound rule. A man with a clean heart can’t be hurt…

The answer lies in Scientology and processing the person up to a high enough responsibility to take a job or a position and carry it out without all this weird hokus-pokus of ‘I’ve got to say you are doing things to me so I can leave and protect you from all the bad things I am doing to you’. That’s the way it is and it doesn’t make sense not to do something about it now that we know.

A recent Secretarial Executive Director to all Central Organizations states that before a person may draw his last pay cheque from an Organization he is leaving of his own volition he must write down all his overts and withholds against the Organization and its related personnel and have these checked out by the HCO Secretary on an EMeter. To do less than this is cruelty itself.
HCOB 31.12.AD9 (1959) HAS! Dept Heads BLOW-OFFS

The suppressive person (whom we’ve called a Merchant of Fear or Chaos Merchant and which we can now technically call the suppressive person) can’t stand the idea of Scientology. If people became better, the suppressive person would have lost. The suppressive person answers this by attacking covertly or overtly Scientology.

But where the student leaves the premises in a blow or doesn’t turn up for class, the Tech Division must send an instructor and the student’s auditor over to HCO Department of Inspection and Reports. An HCO representative should go with them at once to pick up the student. 
HCOPL 5.04.1965 HCO Sec Hat HCO JUSTICE DATA RE ACADEMY & HGC

When you get in Ethics the decent one raises his necessity level and measures up. The suppressive type blows (leaves).
HCOPL 1.10.1967 Admin know-how uses of orgs

ON FAIR GAME
By FAIR GAME is meant, may not be further protected by the codes and disciplines of Scientology or the rights of a Scientologist.

The families and adherents of Suppressive Persons or Groups may not receive processing. It does not matter weather they are or are not Scientologists. If the families or adherents of Suppressive Persons or Groups are processed, any auditor doing so is guilty of a misdemeanor. (See HCO Policy Letter of 7 March 1965, Issue II Suppressive acts suppression of Scientology and Scientologists).
The fair game law HCO PL 23.12.1965

SP Order. Fair Game. May be deprived of property or injured by any means by any Scientologist without any discipline of the Scientologist. May be tricked, sued or lied to or destroyed.
Penalties for lower conditions HCO PL 23.12.1967

The practice of declaring people FAIR GAME will cease. FAIR GAME may not appear on any Ethics Order. It causes bad public relations. This PL does not cancel any policy on the treatment or handling of an SP.
Cancellation of fair game HCO PL 21.10.1968

episodes.title: Update on my Disconnection part 3
episodes.description:
In November/December 2023 I decided to talk about my upbringing in Scientology, having signed a contract at nine years old to work for the rest of my life for the Scientology elite group the Sea Org, joining that group, leaving it at age 20 and then slowly over the years waking up more and more of my indoctrination and brainwashing of it.
I did so on Jeff's YouTube channel @ptsforlife  and there I told my story for the first time publicly and chronologically. I know, after I had done it, that my family members that are still involved in Scientology, would start to disconnect from me as they are not allowed to be in contact with anyone who dares speak out against Scientology, regardless weather they are family, friends or colleagues.
In March 2024 my sister and her husband disconnected from me and now on August the 3 my brother and seemingly my step-father have disconnected from me too.

In the first video I talk about abuse, neglect and self harm due to my involvement in Scientology and in this video I continue the conversation talking about the things I have done to cope with it. I also talk about the signs and the behavior on my part shortly before I intended to take my own life in the hopes this information can help others.
I am not an expert in the field, nor am I a psychologist or therapist, I am simply talking from my own experience.

episodes.title: Suppressive cooking -- The persuasion cookies
episodes.description:
During my time in the Sea Org, working in Scientology I was stationed at the Stables in St. Hill, England (from 2008-2012). There I ran the staff canteen and eventually worked fully in the kitchen cooking the food for the staff.
The statistics to determine weather you cooked well was decided on a simple point system that each Sea Org member would have to fill out to show their satisfaction with the food. Then at the end of the week it would be counted all together and that determined the statistic of the staff cook.
Naturally, many people ended up not voting as they just couldn't be bothered with it. So I came up with the idea of gently persuading them to do so, by bribing them with cookies. And here I show you how I made the persuasion cookies.

These are the Ingredients that you will need to make between 18-20 cookies:
175g/6oz of soft margarine
225g/8oz of caster sugar
2 medium eggs
350g/12oz of either self-raising flour, or 350g/12oz of regular flour with 1/2 teaspoon of baking powder.
50g/2oz of chocolate chips
20g/1oz of oats
30g/1.5oz of walnuts

Please make sure to preheat your oven to 180'C/350'F and bake the cookies for 15-20 minutes.


Here you can find the Interview that Jeff did with me:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0L3MgHAFD4Q&t=7111s

episodes.title: Suppressive cooking -- Tiramisu
episodes.description:
Today I will be doing some chefing.
While I was working for Scientology in the Sea Org (2005-2012) I was stationed at the Stables in St. Hill East Grinstead, England where the staff canteen and the kitchens for the staff food was made and served.
For Valentines-day 2009 a cook (that shortly after left the Sea Org with his wife) made Tiramisu and this recipe is from his own grandmother who was Sicilian. This very recipe I will show you how to make.

You will need:
4 medium Eggs, separated
500g / 17.6oz of mascarpone
140g / 4.9oz of sugar (the original recipe requires 180g / 6.3oz)
24 Italiens finger--bisquits
500ml/ 17.6oz espresso
some raw, unsweetened cocoa powder
a sprinkle of suppression (salt)

This recipe will make about two dishes with each holding 800ml/ 28.2oz

Hope you enjoy and let me know how you did with it.

episodes.title: (D) Ich bin ein Sektenkind von Scientology (D)
episodes.description:
Ich erzähle meine Geschichte als Scientology Sektenkind, wie ich mit neun Jahren einen Vertrag unterschrieben habe um für den Rest meines Leben und für die nächsten Milliarden Jahre für Scientology zu arbeiten.
Wie ich dann mit 13 nach England gebracht worden bin um dort meine Pflichten des Vertrags war zu nehmen.
Ich erzähle über meine Schwierigkeiten als schwuler Mann in dieser Sekte zu sein und meine versuche ´´mein Leben zu löschen`` durch den enormen Selbsthass den ich für mich hatte. über meine Zeit, nachdem ich die Scientology Arbeit verliess in 2012 und wie ich nach fünf Jahren endlich aus meiner eigenen Gehirnwäscherei in 2017 komplett kam und ich mich als Ex-Scientologen beschreiben konnte.

episodes.title: Livestream von The SP Chef
Scientology math is not mathing
episodes.description:
In 2012 Scientology claimed that it's membership increased every year by 4.4 Million. Since then they must have acquired at least 48.4 Million new members, not even mentioning the apparent millions there have already been there before 2012.
Just taking the 48.4 Million and dividing it by the apparent 11'000 Organizations, Churches and groups worldwide would mean each one would provide service to an average of 4'400.
At St. Hill in East Grinstead England there are four Organisations and thus they ought to be providing Scientology to about 17'600 people on a normal basis.
In November 2023 they held the IAS (International Assoziation of Scientologists) event, which is an international event that had not been hosted for a number of years and they did not even manage to round up 8'000 people, which would be the maximum capacity of their event-tent could hold.
If this math is not mathing, then what else are they lying about?
